kpis.name: AI Recommended Order
kpis.description: Rewards reps for fulfilling the SFA one-click order (Cross-sell + Recover SKU).

keyNotes: Recommendation = one-click order suggested by the SFA AI/ML engine for a specific outlet.
SKU compliance = the recommended SKU was billed at the outlet. Qty compliance additionally requires billed qty ≥ recommended qty.
Any SKU within the same CRS / group code as the recommended SKU also counts towards your compliance.
Monthly % compliance = complied recommendations ÷ recommendations served in the period. Per-line basis pays ₹ for every complied line.

sections.text: Recommendations are served daily by the SFA AI/ML engine. A recommendation is "complied" based on the chosen compliance type — SKU only (recommended SKU billed) or SKU + Qty (recommended SKU billed at recommended qty or higher). Any SKU within the same CRS / group code also counts.

subMetrics.title: Cross-sell SKU
subMetrics.subtitle: New SKU being pushed at the outlet.

subMetrics.title: Recover SKU
subMetrics.subtitle: Regularly sold SKU we are upselling back.

keyNotes: Earned on monthly Net Sales Value vs target.
Slab-based payout — higher achievement, higher rate.
Cap applies above the top slab.

sections.title: Cap (maximum payable achievement)
sections.note: Beyond the cap, no additional reward is offered no matter how far the limit is exceeded.

kpis.name: Sales Phasing
kpis.description: Rewards achieving a % of the month's NSV target by a cut-off date.

keyNotes: Rewards hitting a % of monthly target by the cut-off day.
Slab-based bonus on top of monthly NSV.
Zero payout if the full-month gate is not met.

fields.label: Achieve % of month target by day

sections.title: Cap (maximum payable achievement)
sections.note: Beyond the cap, no additional reward is offered no matter how far the limit is exceeded.

kpis.name: Productive Coverage
kpis.description: Outlets billed ≥ the minimum bill value threshold.

keyNotes: Outlets billed ≥ the minimum bill value threshold count.
Slab-based payout on outlet count (MR).
ASO/ASE earn a rate × Avg MR earning under them.

options.label: ASO / ASE — Rate × Avg MR earning

kpis.name: Lines Sold
kpis.description: Lines sold at CRS group code level.

keyNotes: Counts unique lines sold at CRS group code level.
2 SKUs in the same CRS = 1 line.
Same CRS in separate visits to the same outlet = 2 lines.

options.label: ASO / ASE — Rate × Avg MR earning
SKU code — each SKU counts separately

sections.title: Min qty to qualify a line

kpis.name: Focus SKU Distribution
kpis.description: Lines of client-designated focus SKUs at CRS group code level.

keyNotes: Counts lines only for client-designated focus SKUs.
Same CRS counting rules as TLSD.
Refer to the focus SKU list for eligible products.

options.label: ASO / ASE — Rate × Avg MR earning
SKU code — each SKU counts separately

sections.title: Min qty to qualify a line

kpis.name: Quarterly NSV Bonus
kpis.description: Cumulative quarterly Secondary NSV vs quarterly target — same slab structure as monthly NSV.
kpis.sample: MR ₹6,000 · ASO GT + Region up to ₹21,600

keyNotes: Quarterly bonus on top of 3× monthly NSV.
Same slab structure as monthly NSV, paid at quarter end.
Computed on cumulative quarterly Secondary NSV vs quarterly target.

sections.title: Cap (maximum payable achievement)
sections.note: Beyond the cap, no additional reward is offered no matter how far the limit is exceeded.

sections.text: Payout is locked to quarter end and is on top of the 3 monthly NSV payouts within the quarter.

kpis.name: Collection % of Billing
kpis.description: Cash collected vs billed value in the period.

keyNotes: Collected ₹ in the month ÷ billed ₹ in the same month.
Cheque bounces & reversals deduct from collected amount.
Cash & UPI on the SFA app counts on the date of receipt.

sections.title: Cap (maximum payable % achievement)
sections.note: Beyond the cap, no additional reward is offered no matter how far the limit is exceeded.

kpis.name: New Outlets Added
kpis.description: Brand-new outlets billed for the first time in the period.

keyNotes: New = first-ever billing for an outlet code in the period.
Outlet must have at least one bill ≥ ₹250 GSV to qualify.
Re-activated outlets (>90 days dormant) do not count as new.

sections.title: Cap (maximum payable outlets)
sections.note: Beyond the cap, no additional reward is offered no matter how far the limit is exceeded.

kpis.name: Range Selling %
kpis.description: Share of outlets billed across multiple focus categories.

keyNotes: % of billed outlets selling ≥ N categories (default N = 3).
Measures portfolio width, not just volume.
Configure focus categories at the programme level.

sections.title: Cap (maximum payable % achievement)
sections.note: Beyond the cap, no additional reward is offered no matter how far the limit is exceeded.

kpis.name: PCC — Productive Calls / Day
kpis.description: Average productive (billed) calls per field working day.

keyNotes: Avg productive calls = billed visits ÷ field working days.
Excludes Sundays and approved leave days.
A visit is productive only if it converts to a bill.

sections.title: Cap (maximum payable calls / day)
sections.note: Beyond the cap, no additional reward is offered no matter how far the limit is exceeded.

kpis.name: Beat / Call Compliance %
kpis.description: Adherence to the planned daily beat / PJP.

keyNotes: Actual visited outlets ÷ planned beat outlets.
Off-route visits do not count toward compliance.
GPS-tagged within 100m of outlet location to qualify.

sections.title: Cap (maximum payable % achievement)
sections.note: Beyond the cap, no additional reward is offered no matter how far the limit is exceeded.

kpis.name: Must-Sell SKU Achievement
kpis.description: Achievement on the mandatory must-sell SKU list.

keyNotes: Achievement on the mandatory must-sell SKU basket vs target.
Configure the must-sell list per channel / segment.
Different from focus / NPD SKUs — these are everyday hero SKUs.

sections.title: Cap (maximum payable % achievement)
sections.note: Beyond the cap, no additional reward is offered no matter how far the limit is exceeded.

kpis.name: ULPO — Unique Lines per Outlet
kpis.description: Average unique lines billed per outlet.

keyNotes: Avg unique lines billed per billed outlet in the period.
Counted at CRS group code level.
Drives depth of sell-in per outlet, complements TLSD.

sections.title: Cap (maximum payable lines / outlet)
sections.note: Beyond the cap, no additional reward is offered no matter how far the limit is exceeded.
